name: craft
description: Senior-engineer guardrails that stop AI coding agents from shipping slop. Eight composable skills + an always-on rules constitution + a /senior-review gate. Forces strategic (durable) code over tactical (fast-but-disposable) code, grounded in The Pragmatic Programmer, Fowler's Refactoring, Ousterhout's A Philosophy of Software Design, and empirical AI-code-quality research.

author.name: CETI — Center for Educational Technology Innovations
